summary: Phase 3 Firebase Firestore integration testing completed. CRITICAL BUG FOUND AND FIXED: Firebase field naming mismatch (teacherName vs teacher_name). After fix, all features working correctly. Firebase data loads successfully with local fallback. Teacher names now visible on all course cards. All navigation flows, loading states, and detail screens working as expected. Previous features (tabs, navigation, Library, About) remain functional.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings persist: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-critical, same as previous iterations.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Firebase integration working correctly with experimentalForceLongPolling
✓ DataContext fetches from Firestore collections 'courses' and 'teachers'
✓ Local fallback working when Firebase is empty or fails
✓ FIXED: Firebase field naming mismatch - Firebase uses camelCase (teacherName, classLink) but code expected snake_case (teacher_name, class_link)
✓ All course cards now display teacher_name correctly
✓ Loading states display properly on Home, Courses, and Teachers screens
✓ Empty states implemented for Courses and Teachers screens
✓ Join Class button checks class_link - shows alert when empty (Firebase data has no class_link field, so alert is shown)
✓ Dynamic stats show correct counts from Firebase data (14 courses, 3 teachers)
✓ All navigation flows working: Home -> Course Detail -> Teacher Detail
✓ Back buttons working on all detail screens
✓ All 5 tabs functional (Home, Courses, Teachers, Library, About)
✓ Library and About screens unchanged and working correctly
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✓ Mobile-first design maintained with proper spacing and touch targets
updated_files: /app/frontend/context/DataContext.tsx - Fixed Firebase field mapping to use camelCase (teacherName, classLink)

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend in this app
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Phase 3 Firebase features working after bug fix

seed_data_creation: Firebase Firestore already contains 14 courses and 3 teachers with proper data structure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Firebase integration complete and tested. Critical bug fixed: Firebase uses camelCase field names (teacherName, classLink) while code expected snake_case. DataContext now handles both naming conventions. Firebase data loads successfully (14 courses, 3 teachers). Teacher names visible on all course cards. Join Class button shows alert when class_link is empty (Firebase has no class_link data). All previous features from iterations 1 & 2 still working. App loads at https://islamic-learning-49.preview.emergentagent.com

rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: Firebase Firestore uses camelCase field naming (teacherName, classLink) but DataContext.tsx was expecting snake_case (teacher_name, class_link). This caused teacher_name to be empty string for all courses loaded from Firebase. FIX: Updated DataContext.tsx line 84 to check both naming conventions: `teacher_name: data.teacherName || data.teacher_name || ''` and line 87: `class_link: data.classLink || data.class_link || ''`. This ensures compatibility with both Firebase camelCase and local data snake_case naming.
